title: The Duel Turns Desperate
description: On pages 13–16, this part focuses on the duel turns desperate, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: The Duel Turns Desperate. The Straw Hats’ victories against Baroque Works begin changing the momentum in Alubarna. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I will guide you to it.

dialogue.speaker: King Cobra
dialogue.text: Kuhahaha! The wise- king Cobra lives up to his reputa- tion!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: You under- stand your situation quite quickly!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Northern Block Medi Diet Hall Main Street

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: So your body's basically as hard as a sword.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: And as long as I can't cut through iron, I won't be able to cut you either...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Blows and blades cannot harm me.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Well, this is quite the predicament... Since I can't cut through iron,

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: I won't be able to beat you...

summary: This part develops the duel turns desperate and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
